utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items with detailed descriptions and associated costs. Each category specifies what is covered and includes cost information (either explicitly or by noting it is part of the comprehensive package). Thus, every item in the required format is present and fully specified with relevant details and cost breakdowns.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a single bundled package, the 'German Freelancer Complete Coverage Package', which includes comprehensive health, property, and travel insurance with 24/7 emergency support, global coverage, and priority claims processing. Since this package covers health, property, and travel comprehensively for a freelancer engaged in adventure photography, the closest match in the ground-truth data is the ideal insurance profile combination: 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for physical health and travel, 'CareCo Basic Plan' for mental health, and 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' for property. The additional services such as 24/7 emergency support and priority claims processing correspond to 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10) and 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10) which are part of the essential add-ons in the ideal profile. Therefore, the ratings mapping follows these equivalents.
